title: Braised Oxtail Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with tender oxtail and rich flavors.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown oxtail on all sides, then set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté onion, carrot, and celery until softened.
Add flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually add braising liquid, scraping up browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Return oxtail to the pot, cover, and bring to a boil.
Transfer pot to the oven and braise for 2 1/2 hours, or until oxtail is tender.
Season with salt, pepper, and bay leaves.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
